calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jan-02-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: All Parties sworn prior to commencement of the proceeding.

Appearances: Carolyn Douglas (Petitioner). Charles Abernathy (Respondent). Robert Myers (Witness for Ms. Douglas).

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Court denied the requests for the reasons set forth on the record.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
